asset_deployment_issue.problem: SVG files and JavaScript files not automatically deployed via Git (Hostinger auto-deployment missed /assets/ subdirectories)
asset_deployment_issue.solution: Manually created directories and uploaded all assets via SCP
asset_deployment_issue.prevention: Added to deployment checklist: Verify asset directories exist before deployment

database_issues: Custom tables created without wp_ prefix (td_user_data_change_requests, td_id_sequences, td_audit_log)
Fixed: Renamed all tables to wp_td_* to match WordPress convention and $wpdb expectations
Result: 8 existing registration records preserved, AJAX handler now works correctly

description: Complete user registration system with production-grade validation, JavaScript externalization (registration form + manager actions), deployment verification workflow, nonce security, retry logic, and loading states

pages.name: Register Profile
changes: Created custom HTML registration form (replaces Forminator approach)
Two-checkbox implementation: 'I have a LinkedIn profile' + 'I have a CV to upload'
Conditional field display: LinkedIn URL shows when LinkedIn checkbox checked, CV upload shows when CV checkbox checked
Validation: At least one checkbox must be selected
Navy hero section with white heading
White card form container (800px max-width, 48px padding)
13 form fields: 5 personal info (first, middle, last, email, phone), 2 professional checkboxes + conditional fields, 2 identity docs + conditional residence ID, consent
Custom file upload buttons with navy gradient styling
Filename display after file selection
Trust badges footer (4 SVG icons: Secure, GDPR, Legal, EU Standards)
JavaScript: URL parameter reading, conditional toggles, validation logic
ADDED Feb 21: Dynamic nonce loading via AJAX with retry logic (3 attempts, exponential backoff 2s/4s/8s)
ADDED Feb 21: Loading spinner during nonce fetch with form disable
ADDED Feb 21: Comprehensive client-side validation (email regex, phone min 8 digits, LinkedIn URL format, file size 5MB max, file type checking)
ADDED Feb 21: Real-time validation on blur for email/phone/LinkedIn fields
ADDED Feb 21: File validation on selection with instant feedback and file size display
ADDED Feb 21: Visual feedback (red borders for errors, green for success, file size in KB)

code.purpose: AJAX handler for custom registration form - CHANGED: Now creates change requests instead of WordPress users
breaking_changes: CRITICAL ARCHITECTURE CHANGE: Registration NO LONGER creates WordPress users
NEW: Inserts records into td_user_data_change_requests table
NEW: Files uploaded to /registration-pending/ directory (not media library)
NEW: Status set to 'new' (visible in Manager Actions immediately)
workflow: NO WordPress users created at any stage
features: Checks at least one of LinkedIn/CV provided
Creates change request record with request_id, user data, file paths
Visible in Manager Actions 'New' tab immediately
Returns JSON with request_id and status

code.purpose: Shortcode for displaying registration requests in Manager Actions page
features: Shows records where status='new' OR (status='pending' AND assigned_to IS NULL)
Displays request_id, name, email, role, submitted_date, action buttons

code.purpose: Atomic ID sequence generation for USRQ/PRSN/CMPY IDs
features: Uses td_id_sequences table for daily-reset atomic sequences

changes: Updated role selection logic (temporary)
Theme enhancements for custom forms
Updated footer trust badge pattern
Changed var(--color-blue) to #0062e3
Added !important to button hover rules
Added custom styles for registration form elements

code.purpose: Production-grade registration form JavaScript with validation, retry logic, and loading states
features: Dynamic nonce fetch via AJAX endpoint (td_get_registration_nonce)
Exponential backoff retry logic (3 attempts: 2s, 4s, 8s delays)
Loading spinner with form disable during nonce fetch
Comprehensive client-side validation (email, phone, LinkedIn URL, file size/type)
File validation on selection with instant feedback
Visual feedback (red errors, green success, file size display in KB)

code.purpose: Tab switching logic for Manager Actions page (externalized from inline script)
features: 5 tabs: New, Assigned, Approved, Rejected, All

code.purpose: Registration form custom styles (loading spinner, validation states)

assets.purpose: Trust badge icons for registration form footer
Forminator form 53 export for reference (not used in production)

scripts.purpose: Pre-commit deployment verification - analyzes git changes and categorizes deployment requirements
features: Analyzes modified tracked files (git diff --name-only HEAD)
Provides review questions based on detected changes

changes: Updated from Forminator approach to custom HTML form
Added Business Requirements section (anonymous submission, minimal data capture, GDPR consent, email confirmation, unique user ID, database storage strategy)
Documented two-checkbox implementation (LinkedIn + CV)
Added field specifications with HTML IDs
Documented JavaScript validation logic
Added backend processing workflow (td-registration-handler.php)
Documented database storage strategy (users, user meta, media library)
Added deployment and restoration procedures
Updated status to 'Implemented' and target version to v3.6.3

documentation.purpose: Centralized command reference for common WordPress operations

deployment.method: Page restoration + mu-plugin deployment + plugin cleanup + CSS deployment
commands: STEP 1: Deploy code (auto): git add wp-content/ && git commit && git push origin main
STEP 2: Deploy Manager Actions page (ID 36) with JavaScript externalization
STEP 3: Deploy Manager Admin page (ID 38) with latest updates
STEP 4: Deploy register-profile page (ID 21) with nonce loading, retry logic, validation
STEP 5: Deploy td-registration-handler.php v2.0.0 to wp-content/mu-plugins/
STEP 13: Remove unwanted plugins: Forminator, WPForms Lite (no longer needed)
STEP 14: Verify td_user_data_change_requests table exists in production
STEP 15: Verify td_id_sequences table exists in production
STEP 16: Test registration flow end-to-end (nonce load, validation, submission)
